nina.name: Nina Hu
nina.qualifications: Nina has a Bachelor of Musculoskeletal Health and a Postgraduate Diploma in Osteopathy. She has also completed training in Postgraduate Certificate in Health reputation for successful treatment outcomes in clinic.
nina.approach: During Nina's childhood, she experienced delayed speech development, a challenge including energy healing, Naturopathy, and Acupuncture to address this issue. Despite not being excel in verbal, intuitive feeling and palpation.
nina.specialInterests: When Nina feels stressed or low energy levels, she does Meditation and Qigong to restore her energy and calm her central nervous system. Serinces with her clients.
nina.aboutMe: Nina loves sports and often be found engaging in activities such Badminton, Skiing in the mountains, and Kayaking in the Bay. With her first-hand experience of sports-related injuries, she empathizes with the frustrations they bring and offers custom address them effectively.

consultationSteps.title: Initial Consultation
consultationSteps.description: Consent form, case history, physical examination, treatment plan discussion. 45–60 minutes. Gentle hands-on treatment including balanced ligamentous tension, soft tissue techniques, and myofascial unwinding.

consultationSteps.title: Follow-up Treatments
consultationSteps.description: Tailored to your response. May include different osteopathic techniques, dry needling, auricular/electrical acupuncture, and cupping based on progress.

consultationSteps.title: Rehabilitation
consultationSteps.description: Personalised rehab via Physitrack app — exercise videos sent to your phone. Designed to prevent future injuries and support long-term recovery.
